title: phlox × hybrida
intro: Phlox × hybrida, also known as garden phlox, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Polemoniaceae. It is a hybrid of the Phlox paniculata and Phlox subulata species, native to North America and widely cultivated for its fragrant flowers and medicinal properties. The plant contains salicylic acid, a compound similar to aspirin, which has anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a popular natural remedy for colds, fever, and sore throats. Herbal preparations of Phlox × hybrida, such as tinctures and infusions, can be used to treat a range of health issues, including respiratory problems, skin conditions, and digestive issues.
